ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_description" TEXT /* Description of the drug */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the drug (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug was approved */,
  "clinical_trials" TEXT /* Information about the clinical trials conducted for the drug */,
  "therapeutic_class" TEXT /* Therapeutic class of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target (e.g., protein, gene) */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description of the target */,
  "biological_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the target */,
  "pathway" TEXT /* Biological pathway in which the target is involved */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species in which the target is found */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* Alternative names for the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug involved in the interaction */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_score" REAL /* Score representing the strength of the interaction */,
  "interaction_size" INTEGER /* Size of the interaction dataset */,
  "cutoff" REAL /* Cutoff value used in the interaction analysis */,
  "z_score" REAL /* Z-score indicating the statistical significance of the interaction */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating the probability of the interaction occurring by chance */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E-value indicating the expected number of false positives */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  "interaction_mechanism" TEXT /* Description of the interaction mechanism */,
  "interaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction data (e.g., clinical study, in vitro experiment) */,
  "interaction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the interaction */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_interactions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_interactions_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
